name: saropa-lints
description: 2050+ Dart/Flutter lint rules with visual analysis, plus Package Vibrancy for dependency health scoring, vulnerability scanning, and upgrade planning.

viewsWelcome.contents:
Saropa Lints provides 2050+ Dart and Flutter lint rules for security, accessibility, and performance. It has two components: a pub.dev package with the rules and a VS Code extension for visual analysis and configuration.

Requires a Dart or Flutter project.

Open a folder containing a `pubspec.yaml` to get started.

[Learn more online](https://pub.dev/packages/saropa_lints)
[About Saropa Lints](command:saropaLints.showAbout)
[Getting Started](command:saropaLints.openWalkthrough)

Saropa Lints is off for this workspace.

Enable it to:
• Add saropa_lints to your project (pubspec + analysis_options)
• Run init and analysis from the UI—no terminal commands
• See issues grouped by impact, rule, and file

[Enable Saropa Lints](command:saropaLints.enable)

Saropa Lints provides 2050+ Dart and Flutter lint rules for security, accessibility, and performance. It has two components: a pub.dev package with the rules and a VS Code extension for visual analysis and configuration.

Saropa Lints is off for this workspace.

[Enable Saropa Lints](command:saropaLints.enable)
[About Saropa Lints](command:saropaLints.showAbout)
[Getting Started](command:saropaLints.openWalkthrough)

Saropa Lints provides 2050+ Dart and Flutter lint rules for security, accessibility, and performance. It has two components: a pub.dev package with the rules and a VS Code extension for visual analysis and configuration.

No analysis yet.

[Run Analysis](command:saropaLints.runAnalysis)
[About Saropa Lints](command:saropaLints.showAbout)
[Getting Started](command:saropaLints.openWalkthrough)

commands.title: Saropa Lints: Show Issues for File
Saropa Lints: Show in Saropa Lints
Saropa Lints: Show Issues by Impact

saropaLints.enabled.description: Enable Saropa Lints for this workspace. When on, the extension sets up pubspec and analysis_options and runs analysis; when off, it does nothing.

saropaLints.tier.description: Default tier when enabling or re-initializing.

saropaLints.runAnalysisAfterConfigChange.description: Run dart analyze after init or config change when enabled.

saropaLints.inlineAnnotations.description: Show violation messages at the end of affected lines (Error Lens style).

saropaLints.issuesPageSize.description: Maximum number of violations shown per file in the Issues tree. Remaining are shown as "and N more…".

saropaLints.packageVibrancy.githubToken.description: GitHub Personal Access Token for increased API rate limits (60/hr without, 5000/hr with)

saropaLints.packageVibrancy.scanOnOpen.description: Automatically scan when a Flutter project is opened

saropaLints.packageVibrancy.includeDevDe.description: Include dev_dependencies in the vibrancy scan

saropaLints.packageVibrancy.includeOverr.description: Include dependency_overrides (path/git) in the vibrancy scan for security and health checks

saropaLints.packageVibrancy.cacheTtlHour.description: Cache TTL in hours for API responses

saropaLints.packageVibrancy.suppressedPa.description: Package names to suppress from vibrancy diagnostics and hover (still scanned, shown dimmed in tree)

saropaLints.packageVibrancy.allowlist.description: Package names to skip during vibrancy scan (e.g. internal packages)

saropaLints.packageVibrancy.repoOverride.description: Override GitHub repository URLs for packages where pub.dev data is wrong.

saropaLints.packageVibrancy.registries.description: Registry configuration for private Pub servers. Tokens are stored securely in VS Code Secret Storage.

packages.description: Package names hosted on this registry

saropaLints.packageVibrancy.showLockDiff.description: Show a notification summarizing lock file changes after each scan

saropaLints.packageVibrancy.showInStatus.description: Show package vibrancy score alongside the lint health score in the status bar

saropaLints.packageVibrancy.enableCodeLe.description: Show vibrancy score badges as CodeLens annotations above each dependency in pubspec.yaml

saropaLints.packageVibrancy.enableAdopti.description: Show inline vibrancy badges for new packages being added to pubspec.yaml

enumDescriptions: Score, category, archive size, update status, and alerts
saropaLints.packageVibrancy.codeLensDeta.description: Controls how much detail the CodeLens annotations show

saropaLints.packageVibrancy.indicatorSty.description: How to display status indicators in CodeLens

saropaLints.packageVibrancy.sortSdkFirst.description: Keep SDK dependencies (flutter, flutter_test) at the top when sorting

enumDescriptions: No diagnostics for end-of-life packages (view in sidebar only)
Show as Warning only when a replacement is known, otherwise Hint
saropaLints.packageVibrancy.endOfLifeDia.description: How to display end-of-life package diagnostics in the editor

saropaLints.packageVibrancy.weights.reso.description: Weight for Resolution Velocity in V_score (default 0.5)

saropaLints.packageVibrancy.weights.enga.description: Weight for Engagement Level in V_score (default 0.4)

saropaLints.packageVibrancy.publisherTru.description: Max bonus for major trusted publishers like dart.dev (0 to disable).

saropaLints.packageVibrancy.upgradeAutoC.description: Auto-commit each successful upgrade step (creates one commit per package)

saropaLints.packageVibrancy.upgradeSkipT.description: Skip flutter test gates during upgrade execution (faster but less safe)

saropaLints.packageVibrancy.upgradeMaxSt.description: Maximum number of upgrade steps to execute in one run

saropaLints.packageVibrancy.bulkUpdateCo.description: Show confirmation dialog before bulk updating dependencies

saropaLints.packageVibrancy.watchEnabled.description: Enable background polling for new package versions

saropaLints.packageVibrancy.watchInterva.description: How often to check for new package versions (in hours)

enumDescriptions: Only watch packages with vibrancy score below 40
Only watch packages specified in watchList
saropaLints.packageVibrancy.watchFilter.description: Filter which packages to watch for new versions

saropaLints.packageVibrancy.watchList.description: Package names to watch for new versions (only used when watchFilter is 'custom')

saropaLints.packageVibrancy.annotateSect.description: Insert decorative section headers above major pubspec sections

enumDescriptions: Flat list sorted by vibrancy score (worst first)
saropaLints.packageVibrancy.treeGrouping.description: How to group packages in the tree view

saropaLints.packageVibrancy.showPrerelea.description: Show prerelease versions (dev, beta, rc) in CodeLens and tree view

saropaLints.packageVibrancy.prereleaseTa.description: Only show prereleases matching these tags (e.g., ['beta', 'rc']). Empty = show all.

saropaLints.packageVibrancy.onSaveChange.description: Command to run when pubspec.yaml is saved with dependency changes. Empty = disabled.

enumDescriptions: Run only when dependency sections change
saropaLints.packageVibrancy.onSaveChange.description: When to trigger the on-save task

saropaLints.packageVibrancy.budget.maxDe.description: Maximum number of total dependencies allowed (null = no limit)

saropaLints.packageVibrancy.budget.maxTo.description: Maximum total archive size in megabytes (null = no limit)

saropaLints.packageVibrancy.budget.minAv.description: Minimum average vibrancy score required across all dependencies (null = no limit)

saropaLints.packageVibrancy.budget.maxSt.description: Maximum number of Stale packages allowed (null = no limit)

saropaLints.packageVibrancy.budget.maxEn.description: Maximum number of End-of-Life packages allowed (null = no limit)

saropaLints.packageVibrancy.budget.maxLe.description: Maximum number of Legacy-Locked packages allowed (null = no limit)

saropaLints.packageVibrancy.budget.maxUn.description: Maximum number of unused dependencies allowed (null = no limit)

saropaLints.packageVibrancy.enableVulnSc.description: Query OSV database for known vulnerabilities in dependencies

saropaLints.packageVibrancy.enableGitHub.description: Query GitHub Advisory Database for additional security advisories

saropaLints.packageVibrancy.vulnSeverity.description: Minimum severity level for displaying vulnerability diagnostics

walkthroughs.title: Getting Started with Saropa Lints
walkthroughs.description: Health Score, Issues, Security Posture, Config, and Trends — all from the sidebar.

steps.title: Health Score
steps.description:
Your project's quality at a glance: a **0–100 score** in the status bar and Overview view.

Green (80+), yellow (50–79), red (<50). Critical issues penalize heavily.

[Enable Saropa Lints](command:saropaLints.enable)

steps.title: Issues & Inline Annotations
steps.description:
Violations in a tree grouped by severity and file. **Error Lens-style** annotations show warnings at the end of each line.

Filter by text, severity, impact, or rule. Right-click to suppress noise.

[Run Analysis](command:saropaLints.runAnalysis)

steps.title: Security Posture
steps.description:
**OWASP Top 10** coverage matrix — Mobile and Web. Each category shows violation and rule counts. Click to filter Issues.

Export a compliance report for audits.

[Export OWASP Report](command:saropaLints.exportOwaspReport)

steps.title: Triage & Config
steps.description:
Rules grouped by priority — critical, volume bands, and stylistic. Each group shows **estimated score impact**.

Right-click to disable noisy rules. Changes write to YAML and re-run analysis.

[Open Config](command:saropaLints.config.focus)

steps.title: File Risk & Trends
steps.description:
**File Risk** ranks files by violation density — riskiest first.

Overview shows score progression over time. Regression alerts and milestone celebrations keep you on track.

[View Overview](command:saropaLints.focusView)

steps.title: About Saropa
steps.description:
Saropa Pty Limited — building digital safeguards since 2010.

Dart packages, VS Code extensions, and consumer apps for developers who value reliability.

[Visit saropa.com](https://saropa.com/)

scripts.compile: npm run precompile && npm run check-types && node esbuild.js
scripts.package: npm run precompile && npm run check-types && node esbuild.js --production
